title: DependencyEdge
description: Standard schema for a dependency relationship edge produced by Stage 04 (Dependencies)

dependency_id.description: Stable unique ID for the dependency

source_task_id.description: Task ID of the task that depends on another task (references task_id in plan)

target_task_id.description: Task ID of the task being depended on (may be in a different plan)

owner.description: Accountable person for managing and resolving this dependency
